nasb.text: Do not be bound together with unbelievers; for what partnership have righteousness and lawlessness, or what fellowship has light with darkness?

esv.text: Do not be unequally yoked with unbelievers. For what partnership has righteousness with lawlessness? Or what fellowship has light with darkness?

cnv.text: 你們和不信的人不可共負一軛，義和不法有甚麼相同呢？光明和黑暗怎能相通呢？

ccb.text: 不要和非信徒同负一轭，因为公义和不法怎能合作呢？光明和黑暗怎能共存呢？

csbs.text: 你们不可与不信的人同负一轭。公义和罪恶到底有什么相通呢？光明与黑暗有什么相合呢？
